orgPolicy.title: 🚨 Project Orbit — Schedule Your Session TODAY
orgPolicy.summary: Teresa and Kebone launched Project Orbit, a structured recruiter coaching program. PEs must reach out to their assigned recruiter(s) by EOD Monday (7/20) and schedule a session before Q1 closes.
bullets: Check the Orbit Pairings spreadsheet and schedule before quarter closes
Review the PE Coaching Guide in Notion before your first session
Complete post-session documentation within 30 minutes of each session
You’re their coach today — not their manager. Empty-handed, curious, following their lead

orgPolicy.title: VMA+ Launches August 3 — Training Deadline July 29
orgPolicy.summary: VMA+ replaces the existing VMA program with a standalone interview format, AI mindset component, updated rubrics, and a nomination model. All nominated interviewers must complete training by July 29.
bullets: Required: Technical Interviewing Essentials (R&D) + Interviewing with BrightHire + VMA+ Training module (~2.5 hrs total)
Training window: July 6 – July 29; nominees notified via email
Engineering + CX VMA consolidation reverting to standalone format at Aug 3 launch
VMA+ assesses values, motivation, and AI mindset — not technical skill

orgPolicy.title: Candidate Fraud Management — Automation Coming
orgPolicy.summary: PeopleTech, Invite Ops, Security, and Engineering are exploring automation in Greenhouse to label and manage candidates by fraud risk tier. Recruiters will be notified automatically when action is taken.
bullets: Training resources and details will be shared before formal rollout
No action needed yet — stay tuned

orgPolicy.title: Unified In-Office + Comp Rule — On the Horizon
orgPolicy.summary: People Staff is finalizing an approach that ties in-office expectations and comp bands under one definition, measured from each of Gusto’s four offices. Not yet broadly communicated.
bullets: Nothing to action or share with candidates yet
Will eventually affect how we frame in-office and comp at offer stage — Kristin will share official guidance when it lands

orgPolicy.title: Glean Sunset — GH Integration Ends August
orgPolicy.summary: Glean is being sunset end of November. The existing Glean–Greenhouse integration will keep working until Greenhouse deprecates API v1/v2 at end of August. No migration is planned.
bullets: If your workflow relies on Glean search for GH candidates, plan to transition
Existing integration works through end of August, then stops

orgPolicy.title: Gem AI — Continued Investment + New CSM Office Hours + MCP
orgPolicy.summary: Gusto is investing in Gem AI for another year. New CSM Kai Lewis will host optional monthly office hours. Gem also launched an MCP that IOPE is configuring.
bullets: Add questions to the Notion parking lot page ahead of each office hours session
Gem MCP setup in progress — IOPE will share details when ready

orgPolicy.title: New Gustie Onboarding Model — Mindset + Momentum
orgPolicy.summary: People Staff refreshed the onboarding framework: Gustie Mindset (days 1–2) + Gustie Momentum (days 3–90), with AI fluency built in. 92% composite satisfaction in early data.
bullets: Gustie Mindset: days 1–2, foundations + access
Gustie Momentum: days 3–90, role clarity + early ramp
Good context for setting up new hires to hit the ground running

items.heading: Invite Onsite — Denver, July 13–14
bullets: Full Invite team gathered for the team onsite in Denver
Kristin: ‘incredibly impressed and thankful for how you all showed up’
AI Hackathon was part of the program; team photos shared by Michelle Cordray in shared drive

items.heading: State of Gusto All Hands — July 8
bullets: Company-wide All Hands held July 8
Eng All Hands on July 10 — referral rejection complaint surfaced in Slido (Teal Stannard/Brandon Lassoff raised concern about referred engineers being rejected quickly without recruiter contact)
Likely cause: referrers not following hub location guidelines

items.heading: Data Platform Eng Role — Closed After 6+ Months
bullets: Abby Wagner + Jeremy Murdy collaboration finally closed this long-running req
Ashleigh Huffman managed 2 difficult offers, 1 pending HC submission, 5+ urgent final-round scheduling while Abby was OOO
DocuSign emails expected soon for high-priority Growth Data Science roles

items.heading: SF Ruby Developer Event — Gusto SF Office, August 25
bullets: Kevin Gadd organizing the next SF Ruby event hosted at Gusto’s SF office
Looking for speakers (possibly Mike Tria and/or Eddie) and Invite reps to participate
Good brand-building opportunity for R&D

items.heading: Org Health Hiring Snapshot V1 Audit — Still Open
bullets: Jaime launched a live audit at jaimetavarez1.github.io/org-health-invite-snapshot/
PEs asked to click Audit Mode and flag data discrepancies; Q1 commits can be added for a more accurate view
Still open — PE input needed to close out V1
